author: parithosh
content:
I'm only testing with `ethpandaops/lighthouse:epbs-devnet-0` (2x) and with `ethpandaops/prysm-beacon-chain:epbs-devnet-0-sync` (1x). Block prod was disabled and then re-enabled, there's no restart - the chain splits and never heals.

lighthouse logs seem fine

author: potuz
content: I feel that every client is so crowded with bugs still that's gonna be mostly useless. I get that you guys are eager to start your work. But just keeping the nodes up and deploying from time to time is more than enough for the time being. We still have to concentrate in getting the devnet stable

author: sproul
content: I would not expect LH to pass many of the diamond scenarios atm. It’s not so much that we have bugs, we have about 50% of ePBS implemented
